'''Orogor Binn''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Aqualish/Legends|Aqualish]] who was stranded on [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] when [[Ando/Legends|Ando]] left the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] in [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]], just before the start of the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]. The [[Refugee Relief Movement/Legends|Refugee Relief Movement]] resettled him on [[Alderaan/Legends|Alderaan]], although he hoped to eventually return to Ando.

==Appearances==
